landing.headline: Save together. Grow together.
landing.subhead: Create trusted savings circles, track contributions, and keep every round organized.

common.genericErrorMessage: The request could not be completed. Please try again.

login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your circles.
login.recoverySubtitle: Verify your email to choose a new password.
login.weakPasswordMessage: New password must be at least 8 characters.
login.codeSentMessage: If the account exists, check your email for the reset code.
login.passwordResetMessage: Sign in with your new password.

create.title: Create your account
create.subtitle: Set up your profile and start saving with people you trust.
create.guideText: Add your details, secure your account, then review the required agreements.
create.aboutDescription: Use your legal name so your account records stay clear.
create.securityDescription: Choose at least 8 characters and enter the password twice.
create.reviewDescription: These agreements explain how CircuSave works and how your information is handled.
create.fundsDisclosure: I understand that CircuSave is a digital savings-circle coordination and recordkeeping platform. CircuSave does not hold, store, pool, invest, or use member contribution funds.
create.electronicConsentPrefix: I consent to receive required agreements, notices, disclosures, and records electronically. Review the
create.legalNote: You can review these policies at any time in Settings → Legal & Policies.
create.missingInfoMessage: First name, last name, email, password, and password confirmation are required.
create.weakPasswordMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters.
create.passwordMismatchMessage: Enter the same password in both fields.
create.agreementsMessage: You must accept the required agreements and disclosures before creating your account.
create.termsAccessibility: I agree to the Terms of Service and acknowledge the Privacy Policy
create.fundsAccessibility: I understand that CircuSave does not hold member contribution funds
create.electronicAccessibility: I consent to receive required agreements, notices, disclosures, and records electronically
